title: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
description: Find links to Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory social media accounts, our comment moderation policy and a link to our social media policy for employees.
text:
Connect with LLNL
Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL) is deeply engaged with our communities, from right here in California to our collaborators and friends around the world. LLNL’s social media pages are great places to keep up with the Laboratory’s scientific breakthroughs, workplace culture and research opportunities. Follow and subscribe to our many channels to stay connected to everything that’s happening at the Lab.
Science & Technology Review
Science & Technology Review is published eight times a year to communicate, to a broad audience, the Laboratory’s scientific and technological accomplishments in support of national security and other enduring national needs. The publication’s goal is to help readers understand these accomplishments and appreciate their value to the individual citizen, the nation and the world.
View the Latest Issue Subscribe to S&TR
